title: Falcon - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: When Teams is not detected, the Custom Button settings UI shows Microsoft Teams selected by default with a "not connected" message, and switching to Other Providers reveals additional options while switching back shows a modal confirming Teams is not connected.
steps: 1. Open the Custom Button settings UI when Falcon/Mobile does not detect Teams.
2. Observe the new layout with two options: 'Microsoft Teams' (selected by default) and 'Other Providers'.
3. Verify that a message is displayed indicating that Microsoft Teams is not connected.
5. Verify that additional options appear: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing.
7. Verify that the additional options are hidden and a modal appears stating that Teams is not connected.
9. Verify that the modal is dismissed and 'Microsoft Teams' remains selected.
expected: The Custom Button settings UI shows a new layout with Microsoft Teams selected by default and a message that Teams is not connected. Selecting Other Providers reveals additional options. Switching back to Microsoft Teams hides those options and shows a modal. Tapping OK dismisses the modal while keeping Microsoft Teams selected.
